body:
## Severity
**HIGH** (item/NPC names; UI / dialog / quest impact). Cell rendering unaffected.

## Location
- `crates/plugin/src/esm/records/common.rs:108-110` (the `read_zstring` call)
- `crates/plugin/src/esm/reader.rs` (FileHeader doesn't read the localization flag)

## Description
Skyrim ESM uses TES4-record bit `0x80 (Localized)` to flag that FULL/DESC/string sub-records contain a 4-byte u32 reference into companion `Strings/<plugin>_<lang>.STRINGS|.DLSTRINGS|.ILSTRINGS` files (loaded from BSA at runtime).

When the localized flag is set, FULL is exactly 4 bytes of little-endian u32. `CommonItemFields::from_subs` unconditionally calls `read_zstring(&sub.data)`:

```rust
match &sub.sub_type {
    b"EDID" => out.editor_id = read_zstring(&sub.data),  // EDID is always cstring â€” OK
    b"FULL" => out.full_name = read_zstring(&sub.data),  // wrong on localized plugins
    ...
```

On a 4-byte FULL like `0x00012345`, `read_zstring` interprets `[0x45, 0x23, 0x01, 0x00]` as the cstring "E#\x01" before the null at offset 3. **Every Skyrim item, NPC, faction, etc. gets a 3-character garbage name.**

`read_file_header()` reads HEDR/MAST but does NOT inspect the TES4 record's `flags` field where bit 0x80 lives. Skyrim.esm has this bit set on every FULL-bearing record.

There is no `.STRINGS` loader anywhere in the codebase (`grep -i lstring` â†’ 0 hits).

## Impact
~12 lstring-bearing sub-records affected: FULL, DESC, RNAM, ICO2, MICO, NAM1, ITXT, EPF2, CNAM, SHRT, etc. Cell loader unaffected (doesn't need names). Items/NPCs/factions all lose human-readable names.

## Suggested Fix (Multi-Phase)

**Phase 1 (minimum, days):** Detect localization, store the lstring index instead of garbage:
1. Read TES4 record flags into `pub localized: bool` on `FileHeader`.
2. When localized, FULL/DESC become `Option<u32> lstring_index` instead of `Option<String> full_name`.
3. Downstream code that needs the string just shows `"<lstring 0x12345>"` placeholder.

**Phase 2 (weeks):** Add `.STRINGS` loader.
- Binary format: `u32 count` + `count Ă— (u32 string_id, u32 offset)` pairs + string blob at file offset `8 + count*8`.
- Three variants: `.STRINGS` (UI strings), `.DLSTRINGS` (dialog), `.ILSTRINGS` (other long text).
- Loader needs to know language (default "english"); pull from BSA via existing reader.

## Completeness Checks
- [ ] **SIBLING**: Phase 1 must cover all ~12 lstring-bearing sub-record types, not just FULL.
- [ ] **TESTS**: Construct synthetic localized ESM with known lstring indexes; verify they're stored as u32 not parsed as zstring.
- [ ] **VERIFY**: After Phase 1, run on real Skyrim.esm; verify no garbage 3-char names appear in `EsmIndex`.

## Source
Audit `docs/audits/AUDIT_SKYRIM_2026-04-16.md` finding **S6-03**.
title: S6-03: Skyrim FULL is a localized lstring (u32 index), not a zstring â€” names corrupted
